title: Danantara to Announce Full Organizational Structure, Potentially Including Former Presidents

body: Pertamina assures its fuel meets standards amid tampering claims, citing independent tests.

title: ABB: Indonesia May Miss Net Zero Goal, but Progress Matters More
body: ABB’s Anders Maltesen says Indonesia may not hit net zero by 2060, but steady progress and collaboration will ensure a sustainable future.

title: Bank BJB Denies Its Boss Yuddy Renaldi Resigns Due to Corruption
body: Bank BJB denies that Yuddy Renaldi's resignation has anything to do with KPK's ongoing probe into the company's ad placements.

title: Jasa Marga’s 2024 Revenue Jumps 20 Pct on Strong Toll Earnings
body: Jasa Marga posts 20% revenue growth in 2024, hitting Rp18.73T, with core profit up 36% to Rp3.7T, driven by strong toll road earnings.

body: His comments quickly rattled the US stock market, with the S&P 500 index down 2 percent in Monday afternoon trading.

title: Deflation and Layoffs Weaken Indonesia’s Ramadan Spending
body: Indonesia’s Ramadan spending is set to slow as deflation, job losses, and weak consumer demand curb household spending and retail sales.

body: Indonesia suspends short selling, reviews buybacks to stabilize markets as JCI rebounds. Business leaders support regulatory measures.

title: Former Freeport Indonesia CEO Maroef Sjamsoeddin to Lead MIND ID

body: Private enterprises originally got to import 180,000 tons before the government decided to allocate the lion's share to state companies.

body: Indonesia will distribute Rp 50 trillion ($3.2 billion) in Eid bonuses to civil servants, aiming to boost spending and economic growth.

body: Jakarta Composite Index jumps 3.97% to 6,519.6 as strong manufacturing data fuels investor optimism. Most sectors post gains.

body: A record-high rice production in January-April 2025 paves the way for Indonesia to not import its staple food this year.

title: Sritex, Indonesia’s Largest Textile Firm, to Shut Down Factories on Saturday

body: Indonesia is home to the world's largest Muslim population, reaching almost 230 million people.
